name: QD-DETR
adaptations: Package imports changed from qd_detr.* to relative imports.
Transformer scratch decoder tensor follows the input device instead of hard-coded .cuda().
Hungarian matching and span losses accept batches whose ground-truth set is entirely empty.
The QD-DETR negative-pair saliency pass is optional and disabled by the Soccer-GMR MR-only runner.
A paper-style max-pooled two-layer GMR existence adapter and BCE loss were added in parallel.
Shared DualGround, matched-IoU quality, hierarchical counter, and adaptive set-decoder modules were wired as zero-residual HieA2M variants.
Soccer-GMR CLIP+SlowFast/CLIP-text data, prediction, official evaluation, and CLI runners were added.
